status_definitions.blockout: Temporary spatial or visual scaffolding that must not ship.
status_definitions.draft: Functional or authored content that still requires substantial production work.
status_definitions.curated: Reviewed content suitable for continued production, but not release-approved.
status_definitions.final: Release-approved content with completed visual, technical, and export QA.
